textPlain: Great write up! I've found these techniques pretty effective in tricky times over the years, and they don't only apply to tech workplaces.That said, they're very much geared toward "polishing shit" leadership. Getting yourself and the people you're responsible for through the hard times is a crucial skill. Getting them out and onto something better is important too, even if it can be tougher to square with the mandate middle managers work under.
